variants.title: Donaldson P174617 Head Assembly Hydraulic
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P174617 Head Assembly Hydraulic is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Head Assembly Hydraulic, Length: 127.0 mm, Thread: 1 3/4-12 UN, Bypass Pressure: 1.72 BAR bar, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.72 BAR
